title: If time loop theory is real
display_title: If time loop theory is real
wikitext:
[]: If time loop theory is real...             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Mar 19, 2021 12:35 am How many loops removed do you think EoE is? Like would you say Rebuild happens 1 to 2 loops after EoE? Speculate on what occurred in the other loops that we didn't see. THIS IS PURELY SPECULATIVE, PLEASE DO NOT COME IN TO TELL US YOU DON'T BELIEVE IN IT OR YOU DON'T THINK THE TWO SERIES OCCUR IN THE SAME CONTINUITY. THIS IS A THINKING EXCERCISE, IT REQUIRES THAT IT BE TRUE.

[]: Re: If time loop theory is real...             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Mar 19, 2021 12:47 am That's something that, even under the assumption of loop theory, couldn't rly be answered until we've seen the ending, cause the characters might say/ do stuff that So far, the Rebuild/Q timeline is objectively worse than the main one so it wouldn't be a fixit in the traditional sense anyways. I've seen some FFs that were like SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: If time loop theory is real...             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Mar 20, 2021 5:43 pm That's fine Kendrix, just speculate when you can.
